summary: Agent ecosystem sees major platform releases (Grok Build, GPT-5.6 Sol, Codex Micro), security concerns (Grok Build source code upload, OpenAI encrypting Codex instructions), and growing focus on eval reliability and agent memory. User workflows highlight friction with agent costs, eval trust, and tool integration. | Agent ecosystem shifts: Anthropic details Claude containment and behind-the-scenes; Cloudflare launches Precursor for agent detection; Google ships ADK Go 2.0 with graph workflows; Mistral, Vercel, Daytona expand coding agent surfaces and sandbox security. Developer workflows surface Rust runtime shift in Claude Code and headless agent coding patterns. | Multiple agent coding tool releases (Claude Code, Codex, Qwen Code, Gemini CLI), new security frameworks (Doberman, AgentShield), and sandbox/infra primitives (mitos, E2B, CUA). GitHub Copilot gains repo-level usage metrics and mobile PR fix agent. CowAgent (46k stars) and Director (coordination ledger) highlight growing agent memory/workflow needs. | Packages shard: OpenAI Codex CLI and GitHub Copilot CLI updates as top mainstream signals. Strong infra_primitive activity around agent memory (agenticow, greprag), security scanning (drylake), sandbox execution (shell-cli), and eval (agentic-eval, inspect-ai). No user_workflow signals in this shard.
